occurrence_sentence: Cambridge Quantum Computing (CQC) announced today that they have entered into a multi-year partnership with Total S.A. to develop quantum algorithms and quantum computing solutions for advanced carbon capture, utilization and storage (CCUS) technologies, according to a news release.

interaction_phrase: to develop quantum algorithms and quantum computing solutions
occurrence_sentence: Cambridge Quantum Computing (CQC) announced today that they have entered into a multi-year partnership with Total S.A. to develop quantum algorithms and quantum computing solutions for advanced carbon capture, utilization and storage (CCUS) technologies, according to a news release.

interaction_phrase: to support and help develop Total's CCUS R&D efforts
occurrence_sentence: The collaboration will use CQC's expertise in quantum computing and quantum chemistry, including the utilization of CQC's industry-leading quantum chemistry platform 'EUMEN', to support and help develop Total's CCUS R&D efforts.

Cambridge Quantum Computing (CQC) announced today that they have entered into a multi-year partnership with Total S.A. to develop quantum algorithms and quantum computing solutions for advanced carbon capture, utilization and storage (CCUS) technologies, according to a [news release](https://cambridgequantum.com/cqc-and-total-announce-multi-year-collaboration/).

Cambridge Quantum Computing (CQC) announced today that they have entered into a multi-year partnership with Total S.A. to develop quantum algorithms and quantum computing solutions for advanced carbon capture, utilization and storage (CCUS) technologies, according to a [news release](https://cambridgequantum.com/cqc-and-total-announce-multi-year-collaboration/).
